documents/code/infrastructure.md:19:Rule of thumb: when a job runs on **aries**, write cross-node inputs/outputs as `/mnt/taurus/...` or `/mnt/gemini/...` (NFS-mounted there). `/home/jiaxuanluo` is **not** NFS; use `/mnt/taurus/home/jiaxuanluo/...` when an aries job needs the repo source. Always use the fully-qualified `/mnt/<node>/...` form — never node-local shortcuts.
